definitions.text: The part of Earth which is not covered by oceans or other bodies of water.
Real estate or landed property; a partitioned and measurable area which is owned and acquired and on which buildings and structures can be built and erected.
examples: There are 50 acres of land in this estate.
They come from a faraway land.

definitions.text: To descend to a surface, especially from the air.
examples: The plane is about to land.

definitions.text: To alight, to descend from a vehicle.
